word_quickly.notes: From "quick" meaning "alive", evolved to mean "fast, active".

word_happily.notes: From Old Norse "happ" meaning "good luck", evolved to mean "happy".

word_very.notes: From Latin "verus" meaning "true", evolved to mean "very" as an intensifier.

word_quite.notes: From Old French "quit" meaning "free, clear", evolved to mean "completely, quite".
